excerpt: Radio: Gate B queue has extended into the plaza stanchions and screening is losing pace.
body: Operations radio noted that Gate B queue pressure was spreading into the shared plaza lane, with supervisors asking for overflow routing before congestion affected adjacent gates.

excerpt: Staff note: overflow path can be opened on the north side without disrupting adjacent ingress.
body: Gate supervisors documented that the north-side overflow path is ready for relief routing and lane rebalance if the crowd-flow lead authorizes the change.
